preconditions: Application login page is accessible at http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined
Login page displays username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, home navigation button, and back navigation button

testCases.title: Verify login page loads with all required UI elements
steps: Verify the username textbox is visible
Verify the password textbox is visible
Verify the SIGN IN button is visible
Verify the home navigation button is visible
Verify the back navigation button is visible
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads at the specified URL and the username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, home navigation button, and back navigation button are visible and enabled for interaction.

testCases.title: Verify successful login with valid credentials
testCases.expectedResult: User authentication succeeds and the browser redirects to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home where the home page is displayed, confirming an authenticated session.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with incorrect password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the browser remains on the login page URL, and a visible sign-in failure message indicating invalid or incorrect credentials is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with incorrect username
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and the application remains on the login page without redirecting to the home page, displaying a visible authentication failure message.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are incorrect
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the user remains on the login page, and a visible error message indicates that the credentials are invalid.

testCases.title: Verify login validation when username field is empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected, the application remains on the login page, and a visible validation or authentication failure message appears due to missing username.

testCases.title: Verify login validation when password field is empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected, the user remains on the login page, and a visible validation or authentication failure message indicates that the password is missing.

testCases.title: Verify login validation when both username and password are empty
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is not completed and the login page remains displayed with visible feedback indicating that credentials are required.

testCases.title: Verify password textbox masks entered characters
steps: Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: The password characters are masked (for example with dots or asterisks) and the actual text entered is not visible in plain text.

testCases.title: Verify navigation to home page using home navigation button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the login page to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and the home page becomes visible.

testCases.title: Verify navigation to home page using back navigation button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the login page and loads the home page at http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify username textbox accepts pasted input
steps: Copy the text hacklarr to clipboard
Paste the copied value into the username textbox
testCases.expectedResult: The pasted value appears correctly in the username textbox and login succeeds, redirecting the user to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with leading and trailing spaces in username
steps: Enter a username with leading and trailing spaces such as space hacklarr space in the username textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and the application remains on the login page with a visible sign-in failure message indicating invalid credentials.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with whitespace-only username
steps: Enter only spaces into the username textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt fails, the application remains on the login page, and visible feedback indicates invalid or missing username.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with whitespace-only password
steps: Enter only spaces in password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and the login page remains displayed with a visible sign-in failure message indicating invalid credentials.

testCases.title: Verify behavior when SIGN IN button is clicked multiple times rapidly
steps: Click the SIGN IN button multiple times rapidly
testCases.expectedResult: Only one authentication request is processed and the user is redirected once to the home page without duplicate navigation or UI errors.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with extremely long username input
steps: Enter a very long string exceeding normal username length into the username textbox
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles the long input without UI crash, authentication fails, and the user remains on the login page with a visible sign-in failure message.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with special characters in username
steps: Enter special characters such as @@@### in the username textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and the application remains on the login page with a visible error or sign-in failure message indicating invalid credentials.

testCases.title: Verify login submission using Enter key
steps: Press the Enter key on the keyboard
testCases.expectedResult: The login form is submitted using the Enter key and the user is redirected to the home page indicating successful authentication.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with uppercase username
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and the application remains on the login page with a visible sign-in failure message indicating invalid credentials.
